results.title: Thompson to retire from coaching at Teutopolis
results.description: Teutopolis head girls' basketball coach Laurie Thompson announced her intentions to retire from her position with the Lady Shoes on Friday, per a press release from the school.

results.title: IDNR awards grants to 73 volunteer fire departments across Illinois
results.description: The Illinois Department of Natural Resources (IDNR) has awarded $495,000 in federal grants to 73 volunteer fire departments across the state to help with purchasing new equipment or paying for fire training.

results.title: ‘I almost cried’: Virus ruins grand slam dream as shock withdrawal decides French Open final
results.description: Alexander Zverev moved to the verge of a long-awaited first Grand Slam title as the second seed saw off Jakub Mensik in four sets on Friday to set up a French Open final against Flavio Cobolli.

results.title: England have to qualify for World Cup hard way after worst performance of Wiegman reign
results.description: When the Lionesses battled to a gutsy 1-0 victory over Spain in April, the question was: Can they win the World Cup playing like that?

results.title: Kentucky Derby star Cherie DeVaux hopes Golden Tempo surprises, then welcomes a break
results.description: Golden Tempo, the horse that made Cherie DeVaux the first female trainer to win the Kentucky Derby, is not expected to win Saturday's Belmont Stakes.

results.title: Should more Americans adopt EVs? It’s an electric debate
results.description: Newly released data shows the U.S. is falling behind in EV innovation. The reason isn’t what you think

results.title: ‘We Are The Now’: Lompoc High Class of ’26 Looks Ahead to New Beginnings
results.description: A sea of blue and white caps and gowns covered Lompoc High School’s football field on Friday morning for the class of 2026’s graduation ceremony. Three hundred and eighteen graduates [...] The post ‘We Are The Now’: Lompoc High Class of ’26 Looks Ahead to New Beginnings appeared first on Noozhawk .

results.title: Rebecca Grossman's ex-lover Scott Erickson tells court he's nearly broke despite $42.5M MLB career earnings and stake in 'billion-dollar' company
results.description: Earlier this week, jurors ordered Scott Erickson, 58, and Rebecca Grossman, 64, to pay $176 million in compensatory damages to bereaved parents Nancy and Karim Iskander.

results.title: Bairstow leads charge as Yorkshire hand out Roses hammering - ESPNcricinfo
results.description: Bairstow leads charge as Yorkshire hand out Roses hammering ESPNcricinfo T20 Blast round-up: Bairstow and Moeen star as Yorkshire inflict record defeat on Lancashire BBC Steven Croft names 14-man squad for Roses T20 at Headingley Lancashire Cricket Club "Bairstow and Luxton, who lit up this fixture at Old Trafford last year with a Yorkshire record T20 stand of 167, added 105 this time from 62 balls" Yorkshire Post Live: Yorkshire’s women precede Roses blockbuster Yorkshire County Cricket Club
